CMC Market Pulse:
The Essential Weekly Crypto Briefing

Welcome to this week’s CMC Market Pulse newsletter!

CMC Market Pulse delivers actionable market insights, giving you
all the key narratives and developments you need in under 5
minutes.

Let's dive into this week.

Market Overview 📈
-----------------

Bitcoin (BTC) continues to squeeze higher, pushing out a
positive
3.7%
return this week. Ethereum (ETH) traded in line with Bitcoin,
rising
3.38%
in the same period. Total crypto market cap followed suit as
well, rising to
$2.19T,
up
1.28%
from $2.14T in the week before.

Weekly liquidations continued to remain low across the week,
with liquidations leaning toward short positions, peaking at
$282M liquidated on Monday. Across the board, funding rates
remain largely stable, with a slight increase across majors.
Despite the odd altcoin with overly high or low funding rates,
the majority remain within expectations.

* Michael Saylor’s Strategy sells 3,588 BTC for $216M, bringing
their total holdings to 843,775 BTC.
* Coinbase obtains the MiFID license in the United Kingdom, which
will enable UK users to trade derivatives and equities alongside
crypto.
* Sony has received approval to establish a U.S. national trust
bank subsidiary to support the issuance of dollar-denominated
stablecoins.
Traditional markets show some slow signs of recovery from
the prior week’s selloff on AI-related trades, whi

75735.subject: Minebea, Výplatná páska/Payslip 06/2026
75735.body: Milí kolegovia, v prílohe tejto správy sa nachádza Vaša výplatná páska. Na otvorenie výplatnej pásky použite posledné 4 číslice vášho rodného čísla (za lomkou). Ak ste si heslo zmenili, použite nové heslo. _________________________________________________ Dear all, attached to this e-mail is your payslip. To open your payslip, use the last 4 digits of your birth number (after the slash). If you have changed your password, please use the new one. S pozdravom / Best regards, Personnel & Payroll department Minebea Slovakia s.r.o K letisku 1637, 040 17 Kosice

} } * { font-family: Poppins, Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, Arial, Lucida Grande, sans-serif !important; } h2 { font-weight: 700 !important; font-size: 20px; } ul { margin-bottom: 24px !important; } h1, h2, h3 { color: #060607 !important; } h3 { font-weight: 700 !important; } div, li { color: #2E3338; } p, span { font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; color: #4F5660 !important; } .no-style { font-size: unset; line-height: unset; color: unset !important; } .cta-button a { padding: 10px !important; font-size: 14px !important; display: block !important; /* Makes the button fully clickable, not just the text */ } .download-button a { padding: 8px 24px !important;
